Many treatments and procedures mean more comfort and successful outcomes for severe infertility problems. 🧪 IVF – In Vitro Fertilization ▼ Partners' eggs and sperm are mixed outside the body for fertilization, then the best embryo is carefully transferred into the uterus for pregnancy. Our IVF programme combines the latest laboratory techniques with personalised care. Learn more → 🥚 Egg Donor Program ▼ Access our extensive database of thoroughly screened egg donors from Indian, Caucasian, Asian and African origins. Our matching process prioritises compatibility and health screening for the highest success rates. Learn more → 🤱 Surrogate Mother Program ▼ Our vetted surrogate mothers undergo rigorous background checks, health screenings and receive full legal guidance throughout the journey. We support intended parents at every step with transparency and care. Learn more → 💉 IUI – Intrauterine Insemination ▼ A simpler fertility treatment where prepared sperm is placed directly into the uterus around the time of ovulation. IUI is often a recommended first-line treatment for couples with unexplained infertility or mild male factor issues. Learn more → 🔬 PGD / PGS / PGT-A / PGT-M – Genetic Screening ▼ Pre-implantation genetic testing screens embryos for chromosomal abnormalities before transfer, significantly improving IVF success rates and reducing the risk of miscarriage. Available for both structural and single-gene disorders. Learn more → ⚕️ Advanced Fertility Treatments – ICSI, PICSI, PRP & More ▼ We offer the full spectrum of advanced fertility treatments including ICSI (Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection), PICSI, Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy, ERA testing, and more — tailored to your unique clinical needs. From First Step to Baby in Arms We guide you every step of the way — from initial consultation to bringing your healthy baby home. 1 Step One Free Consultation & Evaluation Connect with our expert fertility consultants for a no-obligation assessment. We review your medical history and recommend the most suitable procedure for your situation. 2 Step Two Comprehensive Medical Tests All required tests and checkups performed in one place — hormonal panels, semen analysis, genetic screening, and ultrasounds — to personalise your treatment plan. 3 Step Three Choose Location & Donor/Surrogate Select from our 21+ country network.
